segments.text: This is Dr. Mohak from Tata AIG General. Are you available now for 10 minutes?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Are you available now for 10 minutes?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So, this call is related to your travel light plan, okay? So we have received your proposal. To process your proposal, we will be conducting this call, okay? During the call, I'll ask you a few questions to verify your medical history and your answers will be the part of your insurance application. Okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Once your application will get accepted by Tata AIG Insurance, there would be a legal contract between you and Tata AIG, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In case, in future, if we get to know any information shared by you is incorrect or is wrong, so there is a possibility of a cancellation of your policy or your claim may get rejected.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I'm sure we will act for everything correctly, right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Right. Once you confirm, we will proceed for the policy and audit proper.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So I hope you don't have any issue, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So the call got disconnected, right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, okay. So, as I said, this call is recorded for quality and audit purposes. I hope you have no problem with that.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay? So please tell me your name.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Tell me the last four digits of your Aadhaar card.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And which city are you in right now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Further, I will ask more questions about your health and habits.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You have to listen to the whole question and then answer with only yes or no. Okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, in the last two years, have you ever used products like smoking, tobacco, nicotine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, has a doctor ever told you not to drink alcohol or to stop it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, I don't drink. I've never drunk.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Have you ever used any drugs, narcotics, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever had high BP, low BP, high cholesterol, or anything?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, are you taking any medicines, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: When did you last check your blood pressure?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, I don't remember the last blood pressure check like that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, like a month ago, two months ago, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, it happened around... I'll tell you. I'll tell you about my entire medical condition.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: On 7th October 2024, my ECG was done. The doctor said everything is fine, nothing is wrong.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And on 27th December 2024, my BP tablets were started. My BP was diagnosed.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, my BP tablets were started. The tablet name is Amlong 5mg.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, in the last six months, has your dosage changed?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am. The doctor gave me Amlong 5mg. But after that, for two-four days, my BP didn't come under control. At the beginning, when I went to the doctor, it was 170/90.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. And after three days, I went to the doctor again, it was 140/100.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So then he gave me Amlong H.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes. He said, 'Take this.' It's fine now.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, in the last six... I mean, in six months, nothing has changed. The same medication that was there before is still going on. Right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes. No, ma'am, my BP is controlled. I take Amlong 5. My report was fine too.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: You are taking it since last year?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Since 2024, it's still the same. Right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes. BP is controlled, ma'am. Tablets are Amlong 5mg. Amlong H was also given. The doctor gave me both and said if it feels too high, you can take Amlong H, otherwise, you can take normal.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And have you had any medical conditions, surgeries, etc. due to that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, hypertension related, no hypertension related, nothing.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And because of that, have you had heart problems, circulatory problems, kidney problems, any sensory problems, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Chest pain, heaviness, discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, any valve disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: It happened when I had a fever, and my ECG was done. The doctor said everything is fine, nothing is wrong. You take medicine, it will be fine. I had ECG done.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes. So that ECG report was fine. The doctor said everything is fine, done. You take medicine, it will be fine.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And ma'am, last, last, on 10th February 2024, this year, on 10th February 2024, I had a surgery.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And it involved three surgeries: fistulectomy, with fistulotomy, with hemorrhoidectomy.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Meaning, it was all done in one procedure. I was admitted to the hospital on the 10th and discharged on the 12th.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. So what all was done in one surgery, as you said?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, fistulotomy was done, fissurectomy was done, and hemorrhoidectomy was done.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And all of this was done in one sitting, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: In the same year, ma'am. Just 10th February 2024.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: 2024? I mean, January, February, March, when was it done?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: February, ma'am, the surgery was done.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, surgery for piles was also done.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, all three were done in one sitting, ma'am. Fistula was there, fissure was there, and hemorrhoids were there.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, let me write this down.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: How many days have you had the problem of fistula?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, I last showed it to the doctor in December 2023.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, it wasn't formed then. It was just the beginning. It would have formed, but I went to the doctor later.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So you got a lump because of it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, I used to get a lump.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: I showed it to the doctor first. Actually, it was prolonged, so it caused a problem. I wasn't getting any pus. I used to get a lump that used to disappear on its own. It would get fixed on its own.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So the doctor got my MRI done. In the MRI, it showed a deep fissure.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And along with that, he told me that at 2 and 9 o'clock, I don't know, something like that, that at 2 and 9 o'clock, it might develop into a fistula later.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And ma'am, I am taking medicine for thyroid, hypothyroidism.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: What is your current status? Are you okay with piles, fistula, all of that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: We'll cover it one by one.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, ma'am, I went for a follow-up recently. I just came back from the doctor.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, the doctor said everything is fine.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: A little bit is left, just a little wound is left, that will also be fine in four-five days.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, besides this, cancer or cancer-like conditions, blood cancer, skin problems, any lumps, any tumors, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. He got a procedure done for my fistula. In that, he also took a sample to send for a biopsy. The report came, and there was nothing in it.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, diabetes or high sugar, sugar in urine, thyroid levels up and down, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, my thyroid is under control. I take medicine for thyroid.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, but is your thyroid hyper or hypo?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. And, is it cancerous or any tumor, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So, due to thyroid problems, do you have heart problems, concentration issues, any psychological issues, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, nothing yet. I went to the doctor, all tests were done there.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Do you experience a lot of fatigue due to thyroid, or weight gain, constipation, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am. Weight gain happened, 2-3 kilos.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, for how many years have you had this thyroid problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinus, pneumonia, or frequent cold, cough problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Hepatitis A, B, C, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, or alcoholic liver?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus, any blood or autoimmune diseases?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Anxiety, depression, sleeplessness, paralysis, weakness of limbs, stroke, transient ischemic attack, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's, dementia, or Alzheimer's disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Heartburn, frequent abdominal pain, stomach ulcers, frequent indigestion issues, any ulcerative colitis, Crohn's disease, or pancreatitis problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Kidney stones, gallstones, kidney or urinary tract infection, chronic kidney diseases, or any genital issues, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Besides this, recurrent back pain, arthritis, gout, slip disc, muscular dystrophy, any deformity, disability involving muscle, bone, joint, limb, spine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Eye problems, blindness, cataract, glaucoma, infection, double vision, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing, ma'am. I also got that checked.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, hearing problems, speaking problems, any ear, nose, throat issues?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Besides this, do you want to tell me anything about your health and habits?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, I have told you my health conditions.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Have you ever had any abnormal blood tests, or are there any pending reports, or are you planning to do something in the near future like X-ray, ECG, MRI, CT scan, biopsy, any scopy, blood, or urine test?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, I had tests done. I had them done approximately...
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: I don't know when I had them done.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And did you do it yourself or did the doctor tell you to?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I get them done myself.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. So we have covered a lot of things above. Besides that, have you taken any other treatment that lasted for two continuous weeks, or did you have to meet a specialist doctor, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, once in the past... I remember so much.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When did dengue happen? How many years ago?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And now you have no problem because of dengue?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has it ever happened that due to some illness, you couldn't go to work for two consecutive weeks?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever had any inherited defects, family history of diseases like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, or polio?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you, or your wife, ever been advised any test, treatment, medical advice in connection with sexually transmitted diseases including HIV, AIDS, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has your weight ever increased or decreased a lot, for which you needed medical treatment, surgery, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So thank you very much, I have noted down all your details.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, here I declare that all the information you have given is true, and we will use all this information to prepare your policy.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In case there is any query, a callback will be arranged; otherwise, your policy will be processed as per terms and conditions. Okay?
segments.speaker: doctor
